title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that enables users to generate website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tool supports options for custom designs, templates, and slide decks, and outputs code for functional web pages.
